immediate_rollback: accidental paid action (any tool requesting payment)
sitemap damage (invalid XML, mass URL removal)
mass page creation (>3 new pages in one run)
pause_and_review: 2 consecutive runs with no measurable movement
unexpected error in daily lock or config read
any action blocked by no-spend lock being attempted

rollback_procedure.step_2: RESTORE: cronjob action=update job_id=dcba952b4c45 with Phase 19 prompt and skills
rollback_procedure.step_6: WAIT: do not re-enable Phase 30 without Qasem approval
